headline.zh-CN: 修复旧评审记录残留问题

summary.zh-CN: 删除曲目后，旧的评审分配、播放偏好和通知引用会被正确清理，避免新曲目复用编号时看到不属于自己的历史评审记录。
summary.en: Deleted tracks now clean up old review assignments, playback preferences, and notification links correctly, preventing reused track IDs from showing unrelated historical review records.

title.zh-CN: 旧评审分配不会再挂到新曲目上
title.en: Old review assignments no longer attach to new tracks

description.zh-CN: 后端现在会启用 SQLite 外键检查，并在删除曲目前清理会阻塞删除或造成误关联的引用；迁移也会清除历史数据库中已失效的评审分配和通知链接。
description.en: The backend now enables SQLite foreign-key checks and clears references that could block deletion or create false links before a track is removed. The migration also cleans invalid historical review assignments and notification links.
